channel.title: Posts on Greg Beifuss
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Greg Beifuss

item.title: Hugo troubleshooting
item.description: Fix the Hugo error “Port 1313 already in use” by freeing it up

item.title: Adding TLS 1.2 support for Powershell
item.description: Update Powershell to use TLS 1.2, and configure Windows to use TLS 1.2 as well

item.title: Enter-PSSession, WinRM & NLA
item.description: Troubleshooting and resolving the Powershell error “WinRM cannot complete the operation”

item.title: Exchange & -DeleteContent
item.description: Administratively deleting content from an Exchange Mailbox with Powershell

item.title: Network Troubleshooting and MTU
item.description: Diagnosing and resolving an MTU issue over a L2 link

item.title: Pushing to GitHub via. Git
item.description: Resolving a ‘Permission Denied (publickey)’ error in git, when pushing to github

item.title: Powershell & NTMLv1 use
item.description: Find NTLM traffic authenticating to domain controllers with Powershell

item.title: Pushing Hugo Content to GitHub
item.description: Have Hugo generate your site content and use git to push up to github.io

item.title: Array Speed in Powershell
item.description: Powershell has a number of ways to reference arrays, some that are faster than others. += is terribly slow compared to ArrayList

item.title: Powershell Stopwatch vs Measure-Command
item.description: What’s the difference between Stopwatch and Measure-Command?

item.title: Powershell & Unresponsive Remote Sessions
item.description: Elegantly killing a CPU-consuming remote Powershell session

item.title: Powershell, Exchange & TLS
item.description: Using Powershell to find the TLS versions used to connect to Exchange

item.title: Docker & Printnightmare
item.description: Using Docker for Windows to scan for PrintNightmare (CVE-2021-34527)

item.title: VS Code & Remote Repositories
item.description: Using the Remote Repositories Extension in VS Code to update github content

item.title: VS Code Snippets
item.description: Creating custom snippets in VS Code to simplify writing code

item.title: Powershell, DSInternals & HIBP
item.description: Auditing AD passwords against Have I Been Pwned? by using Powershell

item.title: Powershell & Task Scheduler
item.description: Scheduling a Powershell script in Task Scheduler via. GUI, and a shortcut to doing it repeatedly.

item.title: Powershell & PowerPlatform API
item.description: Querying the Microsoft PowerPlatform API with Powershell

item.title: Powershell & Netscaler API
item.description: Saving a Netscaler configuration via. API with Powershell
